sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

# Get node lists
before_nodes = before.segmentation['nodes']
after_nodes = after.segmentation['nodes']

# Find key objects by comparing positions
before_positions = {}
for n in before_nodes:
    key = (n['color'], n['pixels'], n['hash'])
    if key not in before_positions:
        before_positions[key] = []
    before_positions[key].append(n['boundary'][0])

after_positions = {}
for n in after.segmentation['nodes']
after_positions = {}
for n in after_nodes:
    key = (n['color'], n['pixels'], n['hash'])
    if key not in after_positions:
        after_positions[key] = []
    after_positions[key].append(n['boundary'][0])

# Print changed objects
changed = []
for key in before_positions:
    if key in after_positions:
        if before_positions[key] != after_positions[key]:
            changed.append(key)

print("Changed objects:", changed)
print("Before positions:", before_positions)
print("After positions:", after_positions)

# Now click on the magenta center of the purple square
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 47, 'col': 17}])
</parameter>

before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

# Get node lists
before_nodes = before.segmentation['nodes']
after_nodes = after.segmentation['nodes']

# Find key objects by comparing positions
before_positions = {}
for n in before_nodes:
    key = (n['color'], n['pixels'], n['hash'])
    if key not in before_positions:
        before_positions[key] = []
    before_positions[key].append(n['boundary'][0])

after_positions = {}
for n in after.segmentation['nodes']
after_positions = {}
for n in after_nodes:
    key = (n['color'], n['pixels'], n['hash'])
    if key not in after_positions:
        after_positions[key] = []
    after_positions[key].append(n['boundary'][0])

# Print changed objects
changed = []
for key in before_positions:
    if key in after_positions:
        if before_positions[key] != after_positions[key]:
            changed.append(key)

print("Changed objects:", changed)
print("Before positions:", before_positions)
print("After positions:", after_positions)

# Now click on the magenta center of the purple square
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 47, 'col': 17}])
